label: Transparent puffin motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a puffin beak motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A crisp Atlantic puffin head and beak profile emphasizing black and white plumage, coral orange beak plates, sea-blue shadows, accurate anatomy, and clean natural edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the beak, eye, or head silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves high-contrast plumage and coastal color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Puffin" derived from the transparent puffin beak cutout.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the black and white plumage, coral orange beak, and sea blue coastal color.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Puffin, Puffin, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Content Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, content cards, coastal charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style clear coastal system, precise grid, 8px card radius, beak-stripe dividers, high-contrast readable surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived black, white, coral orange, sea blue, foam blue, cliff stone, and Atlantic depth.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Puffin".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Puffin design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Use the transparent puffin cutout and the light-mode Morphous Puffin board as references. Preserve palette roles, beak-stripe dividers, coastal texture, component language, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Puffin, Puffin, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Content Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from puffin black and Atlantic depth, readable text from cliff white, primary accents from coral and orange beak, navigation and charts from sea blue, subtle coastal feather texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
